description: Four diverse seed prompts for evolutionary search over Stage 1 SAIR equational-theories prompts.
selection_policy: Chosen manually from the ranked leaderboard bundle for diversity of strategy rather than just score.

seeds.notes: Small procedure-runner classifier with a tiny feature set and hard routing rules.
seeds.author: Heath
seeds.title: distilled-rules-1

seeds.notes: Witness-model heavy seed using projection, XOR, cycle, spike-zero, and negation magmas.
seeds.author: Arjun Garg
seeds.title: bank_lookup_v5

seeds.notes: Formal derivation and verified-counterexample discipline with minimal heuristic routing.
seeds.author: Jiaxuan Zou

seeds.notes: Rich feature-bucket classifier with many hand-tuned structural rules.
seeds.author: Adam Betka
seeds.title: 64_hard400
